name: Yi Xuan | Distraction
description:
“Are you alright my dear disciple? You seem to be having a hard time focusing on your meditation. Why don’t you tell your shifu what’s wrong?”

Man this bot took me like 7 hours to make, because right after I finished 2.0, I immediately started to make the bot.

Y’know her character is very complexed, but I respect it. Her backstory actually made me cry lol.

Sorry for all the tokens! But she should be lore accurate!

I even added Jufufu and the others into her bot!

I hope you all enjoy this bot as much as I do!

And don’t worry, I’ll try to find something else for the Miyabi bot, I’ll probably just remove Miya.

Anyways, see you guys! And I’ll see you on the next one! I love you all! Bye bye! 💛🤍💛

Artist: Whoisshewh (I think, I just got the art from that account) you can find the full pic there!

Also I might be making a discord soon..lol
creator: Capt
